metadata.description: Agent skills for NVIDIA cuOpt: routing (VRP, TSP, PDP), LP/MILP/QP, installation (user/developer), and REST server.

plugins.name: cuopt-user-rules
plugins.description: Base rules for end users calling NVIDIA cuOpt (routing/LP/MILP/QP/install/server). Not for cuOpt internals — use cuopt-developer for those.

plugins.name: cuopt-developer
plugins.description: Modify, build, test, debug, and contribute to NVIDIA cuOpt (C++/CUDA, Python, server, CI). Use for solver internals, PRs, DCO, and code conventions.

plugins.name: cuopt-install
plugins.description: Install cuOpt for Python, C, or as a server (pip, conda, Docker) — system requirements, install commands, and verification. Use when the user wants to install or verify cuOpt for any user-facing interface.

plugins.name: cuopt-numerical-optimization-formulation
plugins.description: Numerical optimization (LP, MILP, QP) — concepts, problem-text parsing, and formulation patterns. What LP, MILP, and QP are, required formulation questions, modeling elements, common patterns, and how to parse problem statements (parameters, constraints, decisions, objective). Domain concepts; no API or interface.

plugins.name: cuopt-numerical-optimization-api-python
plugins.description: Solve LP, MILP, and QP (beta) with the Python API. Use when the user asks about optimization with linear or quadratic objectives, linear constraints, integer variables, scheduling, resource allocation, facility location, production planning, portfolio optimization, or least squares.

plugins.name: cuopt-numerical-optimization-api-c
plugins.description: LP, MILP, and QP (beta) with cuOpt — C API only. Use when the user is embedding LP, MILP, or QP in C/C++.

plugins.name: cuopt-numerical-optimization-api-cli
plugins.description: LP, MILP, and QP (beta) with cuOpt — CLI only (MPS files, cuopt_cli). Use when the user is solving LP, MILP, or QP from MPS via command line.

plugins.name: cuopt-multi-objective-exploration
plugins.description: Trace and interpret the Pareto frontier across competing objectives using repeated single-objective cuOpt solves (weighted-sum and ε-constraint).

plugins.name: cuopt-routing-api-python
plugins.description: Vehicle routing (VRP, TSP, PDP) with cuOpt — Python API only. Use when the user is building or solving routing in Python.

plugins.name: cuopt-server-api-python
plugins.description: cuOpt REST server — start server, endpoints, Python/curl client examples. Use when the user is deploying or calling the REST API.

plugins.name: cuopt-skill-evolution
plugins.description: After solving a non-trivial problem, detect generalizable learnings and propose skill updates. Always active.
